Related Entities

  • hospital MERCY MEDICAL CENTER 2-star overall rating
  • hospital MEMORIAL HOSPITAL LOS BANOS
  • snf Los Banos Post Acute 1-star, 59 beds
  • snf MERCED NURSING & REHABILITATION CTR 4-star, 79 beds
  • snf LA SIERRA CARE CENTER 3-star, 68 beds
  • snf FRANCISCAN POST-ACUTE CARE CENTER 4-star, 71 beds
  • snf GOLDEN MERCED CARE CENTER 2-star, 121 beds
  • snf GRACE HOME INC. 4-star, 33 beds
  • snf Merced Behavioral Center 5-star, 96 beds
  • snf ANBERRY NURSING AND REHABILITATION CENTER 5-star, 99 beds
  • snf NEW BETHANY SKILLED NURSING 2-star, 35 beds
  • snf ANBERRY TRANSITIONAL CARE 2-star, 120 beds
Methodology

Data source: Medicare Geographic Variation by County (dataset ID: geo-var-county). Vintage: 2023. Downloaded: 2026-04-12. Rows in source: 33,639.

Additional data sources: CDC PLACES County-Level Data (2026)

Medicare Geographic Variation shows standardized per capita spending, utilization, and demographic characteristics for Medicare fee-for-service beneficiaries at the county level. Standardized payments remove geographic payment adjustments to enable fair comparison across regions.

Full methodology →
